growth_records.medium: Defined mineral medium with acetate + N2O (acetate-limited)

up.method: calculated: qAc=mu/YXAc=0.044/0.18=0.2444 Cmol-Ac/Cmol-X/h; /2 C per acetate=0.1222 mol-Ac/Cmol-X/h; /24.6 g/Cmol *1000 = 4.97 mmol/gDW/h

growth_records.cite: Conthe et al. Life on N2O: deciphering the ecophysiology of N2O respiring bacterial communities in a continuous culture. The ISME Journal (2018). DOI:10.1038/s41396-018-0063-7. [PMC5864245]
growth_records.snippet: P. stutzeri JM300 | Acetate | D=0.044 | YXAc 0.18 CmolX/CmolS | NH4+ 0.38 molN/CmolX (Table 3). Yields ~30% lower than enrichment; acetate-limited < N2O-limited.
growth_records.notes: Pure culture. mu=D=0.044; td=ln2/0.044=15.75 h. qAc=mu/Yxs=0.044/0.18=0.2444 Cmol-Ac/Cmol-X/h; acetate=2C so 0.1222 mol/Cmol-X/h; gDW via 24.6 g/Cmol(CH1.8O0.5N0.2)=>4.97 mmol/gDW/h. qNH4=0.38*0.044=0.01672 molN/Cmol-X/h=0.68 mmol/gDW/h. pH not stated for JM300 (H2SO4 used for control). Table2 absolute rates not reported for JM300 so qN2O/qN2/qCO2 not derivable per-strain; culture N2O:acetate ratio 2.5-3.1 mol/mol.

growth_records.medium: Defined mineral medium with acetate + N2O (N2O-limited)
growth_records.cite: Conthe et al. Life on N2O: deciphering the ecophysiology of N2O respiring bacterial communities in a continuous culture. The ISME Journal (2018). DOI:10.1038/s41396-018-0063-7. [PMC5864245]
growth_records.snippet: P. stutzeri JM300 | N2O | D=0.044 | YXAc 0.26 CmolX/CmolS | NH4+ 0.33 molN/CmolX (Table 3). Higher yield under N2O limitation than acetate limitation.
growth_records.notes: Pure culture. mu=D=0.044; td=ln2/0.044=15.75 h. qAc=mu/Yxs=0.044/0.26=0.1692 Cmol-Ac/Cmol-X/h=0.0846 mol/Cmol-X/h; /24.6 g/Cmol=>3.44 mmol/gDW/h. qNH4=0.33*0.044=0.01452 molN/Cmol-X/h=0.59 mmol/gDW/h. Per-strain absolute N2O/N2/CO2 rates not tabulated. pH not explicitly stated.
